outcome_definition: full_time = (uhrswork >= 35) after filtering invalid hour codes
sample_selection: Hispanic Mexicans (hispan==1, bpl==200) who are noncitizens (citizen==3)
Immigrated in 2007 or earlier and arrived before age 16 (yrimmig - birthyr <= 15)
Age between 15 and 35 with valid usual hours (1–98) to construct full-time employment indicator
